content_body:
For years as a customer of Gottwals Books, I’ve been watching in wonder. I loved the concept of making a great selection of used books available at a reasonable price, but I wondered if it would make for a successful business venture. I just never could make the call to launch myself into this business until my friends in Athens decided to open a Walls of Books®. I really got fired up and contacted Shane about buying a franchise. The entire plan from that day forward has run like a well-oiled machine, and I have been confident in Shane and his entire staff of professionals.

I have a real love for books that I acquired at a young age. I love to read them. I love the way they look and smell. I love the knowledge that they contain. This is a dream made real to surround myself with books and make them all available to the wonderful folks in Ellijay (and the surrounding communities).

Please come in and browse our selection. I’m confident that you’ll be pleased, finding great books along the way.
title: Walls of Books
